title: coptosperma cymosum
intro: Coptosperma cymosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the "false-iba". It is a tropical plant native to Africa, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. Traditionally, Coptosperma cymosum has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, and has also been used in traditional herbal preparations to treat a range of health issues.
